---
title: "Generative AI Timeline"
subtitle: "MGMT 675: Generative AI for Finance"
author: "Kerry Back, Rice University"
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: [default, revealjs-style.scss]
    highlight-style: monokai
    slide-number: c
    transition: fade
    navigation-mode: linear
    width: 1920
    height: 1080
    margin: 0.05
    center: true
    include-in-header:
      - text: |
          <style>
          .timeline-slide {
            padding: 0 !important;
          }
          .timeline-slide h2 {
            display: none !important;
          }
          .reveal .slides section.timeline-slide {
            height: 100% !important;
            padding: 0 !important;
            justify-content: flex-end !important;
          }
          .reveal .slides section.timeline-slide img {
            max-width: 100% !important;
            max-height: none !important;
            width: 100% !important;
            height: auto !important;
            flex-shrink: 1 !important;
            object-fit: contain !important;
          }
          .reveal .slides section.timeline-slide p {
            margin: 0 !important;
          }
          .reveal .slides section.timeline-slide .cell {
            width: 100% !important;
          }
          </style>
    include-after-body:
      - text: |
          <script src="https://hypothes.is/embed.js" async></script>
---

## timeline {.timeline-slide background-color="#0f172a"}

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| fig-align: center

import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import matplotlib.dates as mdates
from datetime import datetime, timedelta

# Keep 16:9 aspect ratio to fill the slide
plt.rcParams['savefig.bbox'] = 'standard'

BG_COLOR = "#0f172a"
LINE_COLOR = "#3b82f6"
DOT_COLOR = "#3b82f6"
TEXT_COLOR = "#e2e8f0"
HIGHLIGHT_COLOR = "#f59e0b"

def make_timeline(dates, labels, figsize=(19.2, 10.8), fontsize=22):
    fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=figsize, facecolor=BG_COLOR)
    ax.set_facecolor(BG_COLOR)

    baseline = 0.0
    ax.axhline(y=baseline, color=LINE_COLOR, linewidth=3.5, alpha=0.6)

    stem_len = 0.04
    for i, (date, label) in enumerate(zip(dates, labels)):
        stem_top = baseline + stem_len
        ax.plot([date, date], [baseline, stem_top], color=LINE_COLOR, linewidth=2, alpha=0.5)
        ax.plot(date, baseline, "o", color=DOT_COLOR, markersize=12, zorder=5)

        ax.text(
            date, stem_top + 0.005, label,
            ha="left", va="bottom",
            fontsize=fontsize, color=TEXT_COLOR, fontfamily="sans-serif",
            rotation=55, clip_on=False,
        )

    ax.spines[:].set_visible(False)
    ax.yaxis.set_visible(False)
    ax.xaxis.set_visible(False)

    span = (max(dates) - min(dates)).days
    pad_days = max(span * 0.06, 30)
    ax.set_xlim(min(dates) - timedelta(days=pad_days), max(dates) + timedelta(days=pad_days))
    ax.set_ylim(-0.1, 0.1)

    # Date labels below baseline
    for date in dates:
        ax.text(date, baseline - 0.015, date.strftime("%b %Y"),
                ha="center", va="top", fontsize=24, color=TEXT_COLOR,
                fontfamily="sans-serif", alpha=0.7)

    # Position axes: bottom=0.60 puts baseline at ~70% from top
    # leaving room above for rotated labels and below for dates
    fig.subplots_adjust(left=0.03, right=0.97, bottom=0.60, top=0.70)
    plt.show()

make_timeline(
    dates=[
        datetime(2017, 6, 1), datetime(2018, 6, 1), datetime(2019, 2, 1),
        datetime(2020, 6, 1), datetime(2021, 6, 1), datetime(2022, 8, 1),
    ],
    labels=[
        '"Attention Is All You Need" — transformers',
        "GPT-1 (117M params); BERT",
        "GPT-2 (1.5B params)",
        "GPT-3 (175B params) — few-shot learning",
        "DALL·E; GitHub Copilot; LaMDA",
        "Stable Diffusion; PaLM; Anthropic founded",
    ],
)
```

## timeline {.timeline-slide background-color="#0f172a"}

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| fig-align: center

make_timeline(
    fontsize=18,
    dates=[
        datetime(2022, 11, 30), datetime(2023, 1, 15), datetime(2023, 2, 15),
        datetime(2023, 3, 14), datetime(2023, 7, 15), datetime(2023, 9, 15),
        datetime(2023, 10, 15), datetime(2023, 11, 10), datetime(2023, 12, 10),
    ],
    labels=[
        "ChatGPT — 100M users in 2 months",
        "Microsoft invests $10B in OpenAI; Bard",
        "Meta LLaMA — open-source movement",
        "GPT-4 (multimodal); Claude 1.0",
        "Claude 2 (100K context); Llama 2",
        "Amazon invests $4B in Anthropic",
        "Mistral 7B — European open-source AI",
        "GPT-4 Turbo (128K); Altman fired & reinstated",
        "Google Gemini; Mixtral 8x7B (MoE)",
    ],
)
```

## timeline {.timeline-slide background-color="#0f172a"}

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| fig-align: center

make_timeline(
    fontsize=18,
    dates=[
        datetime(2024, 2, 15), datetime(2024, 3, 4), datetime(2024, 4, 18),
        datetime(2024, 5, 15), datetime(2024, 6, 20), datetime(2024, 7, 23),
        datetime(2024, 9, 12), datetime(2024, 10, 22), datetime(2024, 12, 10),
    ],
    labels=[
        "Sora announced (text→video); Bard → Gemini",
        "Claude 3 family (Haiku/Sonnet/Opus, 200K context)",
        "Llama 3 (8B and 70B)",
        "Gemini 1.5 Pro (1M context); GPT-4o",
        "Claude 3.5 Sonnet — surpasses Opus",
        "Llama 3.1 (405B) — largest open-weight model",
        "OpenAI o1 — first reasoning model; $6.6B raise",
        "Claude 3.5 Sonnet updated + computer use",
        "Sora public; full o1; Gemini 2.0 Flash",
    ],
)
```

## timeline {.timeline-slide background-color="#0f172a"}

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| fig-align: center

make_timeline(
    dates=[
        datetime(2025, 1, 20), datetime(2025, 2, 15), datetime(2025, 3, 15),
        datetime(2025, 4, 15), datetime(2025, 5, 15),
    ],
    labels=[
        "DeepSeek R1; Nvidia drops $600B; Stargate ($500B JV)",
        "Gemini 2.0 Pro + Deep Research; Mistral Small 3",
        "Claude 3.7 Sonnet (hybrid reasoning); Claude Code; o3-mini",
        "o3 + o4-mini; Llama 4; Gemini 2.5 Pro",
        "Claude Sonnet 4 + Opus 4; OpenAI Codex",
    ],
)
```
